title: Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right
summary: 本文澄清了AI代理领域的关键术语，包括Harness（代理运行环境）、Scaffold（代理结构框架）等，并强调正确使用术语对理解和开发AI代理系统的重要性。
highlights: Harness refers to the environment in which an AI agent operates, including tools and interfaces.
Scaffold describes the structural framework that organizes an agent's components and workflows.
Getting the terms right is crucial for clear communication and effective development of AI agents.
